redis.program_description: Redis - in-memory data structure store (CLI and commands)

connect.description: Connects to a Redis server with the CLI [citation:3][citation:8]

set-key.description: Sets a key with a string value [citation:3][citation:8]

get-key.description: Gets the string value of a key [citation:3][citation:8]

set-expire.description: Sets an expiration time on a key (in seconds) [citation:3]

check-ttl.description: Shows the remaining time to live of a key [citation:3][citation:8]

list-keys.description: Lists all keys matching a pattern (use with care!) [citation:3][citation:8]
commands: SCAN 0 MATCH <pattern> COUNT <n>  # for large datasets

hash-set.description: Sets a field in a hash [citation:3][citation:8]

hash-get.description: Gets a field from a hash [citation:3][citation:8]

list-push.description: Pushes a value to a list (from left or right) [citation:3][citation:8]

list-pop.description: Pops a value from a list (from left or right) [citation:8]

list-range.description: Gets a range of elements from a list [citation:3][citation:8]

set-add.description: Adds a member to a set [citation:3][citation:8]

set-members.description: Gets all members of a set [citation:3][citation:8]

info.description: Returns information and statistics about the server [citation:8]
commands: INFO [section]  # e.g., INFO keyspace, INFO memory
